violations.text: The hand-washing sink in the coffee area was lacking paper towels. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/09/2024
The hand-washing sink in the coffee area was lacking signage. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 05/10/2024

Pollock fish was observed held at 48-51 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. PIC voluntarily disposed of. New Violation. Correct By: 05/09/2024

The door to the outside, located in the entrance, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 05/23/2024
Drinks were observed stored on the floor in the retail area. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 05/09/2024
At the time of inspection, ambient of pepsi refrigerator was 48 degrees Fahrenheit. PIC took unit out of service. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/09/2024

Employees' personal belongings were observed stored in the retail freezer. Lockers or other suitable facilities shall be used for the orderly storage of employees' clothing and other possessions. PIC informed. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/09/2024
